message:
fix(tests): recover from poisoned mutex in VCR env tests

When one VCR env test panics, the shared env_test_lock mutex gets
poisoned, cascading failures to all other VCR tests that try to
acquire it. Use unwrap_or_else(PoisonError::into_inner) to recover
from poisoned mutexes, preventing cascade failures in CI.

Also adds lock_env() helper for cleaner call sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
